content: Your mommy won’t save you. Other Mommy only in theaters October 9. Can I go inside your heart? From James Wan, one of the most influential architects of modern horror behind the Saw, Insidious and The Conjuring franchises—and Rob Savage, the director of bold genre films Host and The Boogeyman, comes a terrifying trip into the darkening world of a young girl, Bela, who forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother. Academy Award® winner Jessica Chastain (It Chapter Two, The Eyes of Tammy Faye) stars in a dual role as Bela’s mother and as “Other Mommy,” a manifestation of the entity. Jay Duplass (Transparent, Industry) plays Daddo, Bela’s father, and Arabella Olivia Clark (The Housemaid, The Hand that Rocks the Cradle) plays Bela. The impressive supporting cast includes Actor Award nominee Dichen Lachman (Severance), Emmy and Tony Award nominee Arian Moayed (Succession) and screen legend Karen Allen (Indiana Jones films). From Blumhouse Atomic Monster, Other Mommy is directed by Rob Savage from a screenplay by WGA award winner Nathan Elston, writer for the Emmy-winning sensation Succession, based on the New York Times bestselling novel Incidents Around the House by Josh Malerman (Bird Box). The film is produced by James Wan, p.g.a., and is executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Rob Savage, Josh Malerman and Ryan Lewis. Social Handles Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/othermommy/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/othermommy/ TikTok: http://www.tiktok.com/@othermommy Official Site: https://www.othermommymovie.com #OtherMommy
chineseTitle: | 其 | 他 | 妈 | 咪 | | | | 官 | 方 | 预 | 告 | 片 |
chineseContent: 你妈妈不会救你的。 《别家妈妈》10月9日上映。我可以走进你的心里吗？ 《电锯惊魂》、《潜伏》和《招魂》系列电影背后最有影响力的现代恐怖片缔造者之一詹姆斯·温 (James Wan) 和大胆类型电影《海妖》和《妖怪》的导演罗布·萨维奇 (Rob Savage) 联手，带您进入了一个年轻女孩贝拉的黑暗世界，她与家里的一个险恶实体发生了关系，这个实体与她的母亲长得惊人地相似。奥斯卡金像奖得主杰西卡·查斯坦（杰西卡·查斯坦）（《第二章》、《塔米·费伊之眼》）饰演贝拉的母亲和“另一个妈妈”（该实体的体现）的双重角色。杰伊·杜普拉斯（《透明家庭》、《工业》）饰演贝拉的父亲爸爸，阿拉贝拉·奥利维亚·克拉克（《女仆》、《摇篮之手》）饰演贝拉。令人印象深刻的配角包括演员奖提名者迪钦·拉赫曼（《遣散会》）、艾美奖和托尼奖提名者阿里安·莫耶德（《继承之战》）和银幕传奇人物凯伦·艾伦（夺宝奇兵系列电影）。 《Blumhouse Atomic Monster》出品，由罗布·萨维奇 (Rob Savage) 执导，剧本由 WGA 奖得主内森·埃尔斯顿 (Nathan Elston) 编剧，内森·埃尔斯顿是艾美奖获奖影片《继承》的编剧，改编自乔什·马勒曼 (Josh Malerman) 的《纽约时报》畅销小说《屋内事件》(Bird Box)。这部电影由美国职业球员协会制片人温子仁 (James Wan) 担任制片人，迈克尔·克莱尔 (Michael Clear)、贾德森·斯科特 (Judson Scott)、罗布·萨维奇 (Rob Savage)、乔什·马勒曼 (Josh Malerman) 和瑞恩·刘易斯 (Ryan Lewis) 担任执行制片人。社交手柄 Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/othermommy/ Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/othermommy/ TikTok：http://www.tiktok.com/@othermommy 官方网站：https://www.othermommymovie.com #OtherMommy
